nasb.text: It came about when the sun had set, that it was very dark, and behold, there appeared a smoking oven and a flaming torch which passed between these pieces.

esv.text: When the sun had gone down and it was dark, behold, a smoking fire pot and a flaming torch passed between these pieces.

cnv.text: 日落天黑的時候，忽然有冒煙的爐和燒著的火把，從那些肉塊中經過。

ccb.text: 太阳下山后，大地黑暗，突然有冒烟的火炉和点着的火炬在肉块中经过。

csbs.text: 日落天黑的时候，看哪，有冒烟的火炉和燃烧的火把在这些肉块之间经过！
